questions: What is the patient's serum creatinine level in mg/dl?
What is the patient's weight in kg?
What is the patient's age in years?
What is the patient's GFR in ml/min/1.73m2?
Is there evidence of kidney damage (structural or functional abnormality) for > 3 months? (Yes/No)
What is the level of proteinuria (g/day)?
Does the patient have a history of hypertension? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have diabetes mellitus? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a family history of hereditary kidney disease (e.g., ADPKD, Alport syndrome)? (Yes/No)
Are there signs of obstructive nephropathy, urinary tract infections, extrarenal infections? (Yes/No)
Is the patient taking any nephrotoxic drugs? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have congestive cardiac failure? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have hypokalemia or hyperuricemia? (Yes/No)
